Quick drop counter.comment: Counter of quick drop process, sent by EVC

SlowChargingCurrent.comment: EVC slow charge current set point

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DIDFFF0.Derating_Mode_Active.comment: Alarm that indicates the BCB entered the Derating Mode (any reason)

DIDFFF0.Input_Overcurrent_Alarm.comment: Max input current has been hard-limited

DIDFFF0.Output_Overcurrent_Alarm.comment: Max output current has been hard-limited

DIDFFF0.Primary_Hardware_Alarm.comment: A hardware failure @ primary side stopped the DCDC

DIDFFF0.Secondary_Hardware_Alarm.comment: A hardware failure @ secondary side stopped the DCDC

DIDFFF0.Output_Short_Circuit_Alarm.comment: A short-circuit @ charger output has been detected

DIDFFF0.SCI_Error.comment: Some message from Control Board not received

DIDFFF0.Interlock_sec_connector_sts.comment: Status interlock connector secondary (0: open, 1: closed)

DIDFFF0.Final_Ambient_temperature.comment: Result of the ambient temperature processing

DIDFFF0.Status_FCHG_N_Relay.comment: Monitor the status of the Fast charge relay positive

DIDFFF0.Status_FCHG_P_Relay.comment: Monitor the status of the Fast charge relay negative

DIDFFF0.Input_current.comment: Measure of the input AC current

DIDFFF1.Input_Current_Limit.comment: Input current limit value (foreseen values are 10,15,16 and 20A)

DIDFFF1.FCHG_Vdrop_Relay_P.comment: Voltage drop fast charge relay P status (0: open, 1: closed)

DIDFFF1.FCHG_Vdrop_Relay_N.comment: Voltage drop fast charge relay N status (0: open, 1: closed)

DIDFFF1.PFC_Alarm_Reset.comment: Recover the PFC operation after an alarm condition

DIDFFF1.Set_Output_Max_Current.comment: To program the max output current
